title: INTERSECT operator should have higher precedence
description:
drh added on 2014-03-11 13:05:24:
This is a known issue with the parser.  It is documented.  We won't change it
because making the change might break legacy.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT value FROM test_table1 INTERSECT SELECT value FROM test_table2 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
